arts.ttl: Man City transfer latest amid £120million triple signing and intensifying midfielder search
arts.sum: Manchester City transfer latest as the Blues look set to complete several January deals

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Man City: Confirmed Lineups, Injuries and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Ipswich vs Man City: Sunday 19th January 2025, 16:30 GMT Ipswich and Manchester City round off Sunday’s Premier League action as the pair meet at Portman Road this evening. Ipswich vs Man Cit...

arts.ttl: Man City weigh up move for Juventus midfielder Douglas Luiz just six months after his Aston Villa exit... with Omar Marmoush set for medical ahead of his £63m transfer from Frankfurt
arts.sum: Luiz, who plays for the same club as his girlfriend, Alisha Lehmann, has played just 16 times for Juventus this season and could already be on his way out of the club.

arts.ttl: Man City players have found their joy - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his team have rediscovered the "joy" in their job after a 6-0 Premier League win over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Pundits: Man City ‘can finish in top two’ but can they win title?
arts.sum: After a slow start to the campaign, Phil Foden, who was making his 200th start for the club at Portman Road, looks to have rediscovered his best form, scoring five goals in his last three Premier League matches, the most of any player in 2025. "I just don't think Liverpool are going to lose enough games for City to have a chance but to finish in the top two, I think Man City are more than capable of doing that," Schwarzer told BBC Radio 5 Live .

arts.ttl: Pep on Ipswich thrashing: 'Man City are back'
'Not our best, but closer' - how high can Man City finish?
arts.sum: After a dreadful run of form during November and December, Manchester City looked more like their old selves as they thrashed Ipswich 6-0 on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man City keen on Juventus full-back Cambiaso
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in signing Juventus and Italy full-back Andrea Cambiaso.

arts.ttl: INSIDE SPORT: Man City officials are surprised Richard Masters hasn't acknowledged Erling Haaland's nine-and-a-half year deal
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN - INSIDE SPORT: Regardless of the ongoing legal situation between the two, Haaland is one of the most instantly recognisable players on the planet.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has Alex Ferguson in sight as Manchester City close in on Premier League record
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is closing in one of Sir Alex Ferguson's Premier League record and is level with Arsenal legend Arsene Wenger.
